items.title: Is Avoiding Extinction from AI Really an Urgent Priority?
items.summary: This article is the result of a collaboration between philosopher Seth Lazar, AI impacts researcher Arvind Narayanan, and fast.ai’s Jeremy Howard. At fast.ai we believe that planning for our future with AI is a complex topic and requires bringing together cross-disciplinary expertise.

authors.name: Seth Lazar, Jeremy Howard, & Arvind Narayanan

items.title: Mojo may be the biggest programming language advance in decades
items.summary: I remember the first time I used the v1.0 of Visual Basic. Back then, it was a program for DOS. Before it, writing programs was extremely complex and I’d never managed to make much progress beyond the most basic toy applications. But with VB, I drew a button on the screen, typed in a single line of code that I wanted to run when that button was clicked, and I had a complete application I could now run. It was such an amazing experience that I’ll never forget that feeling.
